final:
module RefModule 
(
  input rst_n,
  input clk,
  input shift_in,

  output reg [7:0] out
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!rst_n) 
	begin
      out <= 8'b00000000;
    end 

	else 
	begin
      out <= {out[6:0], shift_in};
    end
  end

endmodule
